reference: A couple of years ago, I had severe knee problems. My left outer knee would experience sharp, shooting pain that would take me to the floor. I read about megadoses of vitamin D3, and the pain went away instantly; I have not fallen again. Lately, symptoms are back, and I can't remember how much I took. I am currently taking ten,zero units, and it is not working.
